description_long: This is a compact, modern chaise with a sleek, minimalist design, upholstered in a smooth, dark material that appears to be leather or faux leather. The backrest is gently curved and extends the full width of the seat, providing continuous support. Both armrests are rounded and integrated into the frame, giving the piece a cohesive and inviting appearance. The seat is a single, unbroken cushion, offering a streamlined look without visible seams or tufting. The legs are short, straight, and slightly tapered, finished in a dark color that matches the upholstery. Overall, the chaise exudes a contemporary urban style suitable for public spaces such as parks, lobbies, or waiting areas.
description: A modern, dark-colored chaise with a smooth, continuous backrest, rounded armrests, and a single seat cushion. Its sleek design and short, tapered legs give it a contemporary urban appeal.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full width of the curved backrest, both rounded armrests, and the single seat cushion.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the depth of the seat, the curve of the backrest, and the rounded armrest on the left.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the smooth, unadorned backrest and both armrests extending outward.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the seat depth, backrest curve, and right armrest.
attribute_backrest_design: The backrest is gently curved, extends the full width of the seat, and is of medium height. It is smooth and unsegmented, with no visible tufting, buttons, or decorative elements.
attribute_armrest_presence: Armrests are present on both sides, rounded in shape, and seamlessly integrated into the frame.
attribute_leg_style: The legs are short, straight, and slightly tapered, likely made of wood or metal, and finished in a dark color to match the upholstery. They have a simple, modern appearance with no decorative elements.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: The upholstery is solid in color with a smooth, untextured surface and no visible patterns, tufting, or quilting.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: There is a single, attached seat cushion that spans the width of the chaise, with no additional loose or layered cushions visible.
